scenario: Lead mixes Singlish and Mandarin asking about melasma treatment options

turns.content: hello, my 黑斑 quite bad leh, especially the cheek part. you all got treatment for this anot?

mustAsk: how long they have had the pigmentation or what they have tried before
shouldDo: match the warm Singlish WhatsApp tone naturally

scenario: Lead switches between Malay and English asking about acne and acne scars

turns.content: hi, jerawat saya teruk and ada parut also. you all ada treatment for acne scars ke?

mustAsk: how long they have had the acne or how severe the scarring is
shouldDo: match the warm Manglish WhatsApp tone naturally

scenario: Lead uses heavy Singlish asking whether HIFU can help with a double chin

turns.content: eh hello, my 双下巴 very obvious sia. HIFU can help or not ah? need to do how many times one?

mustAsk: a bit about their goals or current concern with the chin/jawline
shouldDo: match the casual Singlish WhatsApp tone
frame next step as a consult to assess suitability

scenario: Lead opens in Malay then switches to English asking about Pico laser for freckles and price

turns.content: berapa harga untuk pico laser? i ada banyak freckles on the nose, want to remove. boleh share?

mustAsk: a bit more about their skin concern or what areas they want treated
shouldDo: match the warm Manglish WhatsApp tone
frame pricing as best confirmed after a consult

scenario: Lead mixes Singlish and Mandarin asking about Botox for forehead fine lines

turns.content: hi hi, my 额头 got fine lines starting liao, quite paiseh. botox can smooth it anot? will look very stiff bo?

mustAsk: a bit about the lines they want addressed or what look they are hoping for
shouldDo: match the warm Singlish WhatsApp tone
reassure gently without making medical claims
